utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items required in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with all details as implied by the format: 
- property: Includes selected property with details and price (address, type, price, size, bedrooms, features, monthly_maintenance) — fully specified.
- financing: Includes financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, down payment, monthly payment, total monthly housing cost, lender, contact, appointment, arrangement fee) — sufficiently detailed.
- legal_services: Includes legal services with costs (recommended firms with contacts and consultations, legal package cost, property survey cost) — fully specified.
- moving_services: Includes moving arrangements with costs (company, contact, service, cost, dates, confirmation) — fully specified.
- setup_services: Includes utility and setup services (package, cost, activation date, internet installation, services included) — fully specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown (purchase price, down payment, legal services, survey, moving, utility setup, mortgage arrangement, total upfront costs, monthly costs, available funds, remaining buffer) — fully specified.
All 6 required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution selects a purchase property described as a Commercial Conversion Loft at CAD $380,000, which corresponds to the ground-truth 'Commercial Conversion' purchase property. It also specifies a first-time buyer style mortgage with an arrangement fee of CAD $800, matching 'First-Time Buyer' in purchase_financing. The legal package chosen is a premium package at CAD $1,200, which maps to 'Premium Legal Package'. The property survey selected is a full structural survey at CAD $650, mapping to 'Full Structural Survey'. The moving service is a premium moving service at CAD $750, which corresponds to 'Premium Moving'. The utility setup is a premium utilities package, mapping to 'Premium Utilities'.
